description: Strings that Hash::parse must reject: wrong decoded length, malformed hex, or a disallowed 0x/0X prefix.

invalid.name: non_hex
invalid.reason: 64 chars but contains a non-hex character

invalid.name: hex_prefix_lower
invalid.reason: 0x-prefixed; not a bare canonical 64-char hex string

invalid.name: hex_prefix_upper
invalid.reason: 0X-prefixed; not a bare canonical 64-char hex string
